summary.zh: 这是我们博客的第一篇文章，欢迎大家的到来。
summary.en: This is the first post of our blog. Welcome everyone.

content.zh: 欢迎来到半生雨博客！这里是我们分享想法和故事的地方。希望你能在这里找到有价值的内容。
content.en: Welcome to Oblivion blog! This is where we share our thoughts and stories. We hope you find valuable content here.

summary.zh: 探讨现代技术如何影响我们的生活。
summary.en: Exploring how modern technology affects our lives.

content.zh: 技术正在以前所未有的速度改变我们的生活方式。在这篇文章中，我们将探讨这些变化带来的机遇与挑战。
content.en: Technology is changing our way of life at an unprecedented pace. In this article, we will explore the opportunities and challenges brought by these changes.

title.zh: Vue 3 组合式 API 入门指南
title.en: Getting Started with Vue 3 Composition API

summary.zh: 深入了解 Vue 3 的组合式 API，学习如何编写更优雅的组件代码。
summary.en: Dive deep into Vue 3's Composition API and learn how to write more elegant component code.

content.zh: Vue 3 引入了组合式 API，这是一种全新的编写组件逻辑的方式。通过 setup() 函数，我们可以更灵活地组织和复用代码逻辑。本文将介绍 ref、reactive、computed 等核心概念。
content.en: Vue 3 introduced the Composition API, a new way to write component logic. Through the setup() function, we can organize and reuse code logic more flexibly. This article will introduce core concepts like ref, reactive, and computed.

title.zh: 如何构建现代化的博客系统
title.en: How to Build a Modern Blog System

summary.zh: 从零开始搭建一个功能完善的个人博客，包括前后端架构设计。
summary.en: Build a fully-featured personal blog from scratch, including frontend and backend architecture design.

content.zh: 构建一个现代化的博客系统需要考虑很多方面：响应式设计、SEO 优化、性能优化、内容管理等。本文将分享我们在开发半生雨博客时的经验和最佳实践。
content.en: Building a modern blog system requires consideration of many aspects: responsive design, SEO optimization, performance optimization, content management, etc. This article will share our experience and best practices in developing the Oblivion blog.

title.zh: 深色模式设计最佳实践

summary.zh: 探索如何为网站添加优雅的深色模式，提升用户体验。
summary.en: Explore how to add an elegant dark mode to your website and improve user experience.

content.zh: 深色模式不仅仅是将背景变黑那么简单。一个好的深色主题需要仔细调整颜色对比度、阴影效果和视觉层次。本文将分享一些设计深色模式时的技巧和注意事项。
content.en: Dark mode is not just about making the background black. A good dark theme requires careful adjustment of color contrast, shadow effects, and visual hierarchy. This article will share some tips and considerations when designing dark mode.

summary.zh: 盘点今年最值得关注的前端技术和发展方向。
summary.en: A roundup of the most noteworthy frontend technologies and directions this year.

content.zh: 2024 年，前端开发领域将继续蓬勃发展。AI 辅助开发、边缘计算、WebAssembly 等技术正在重塑我们构建 Web 应用的方式。让我们一起来看看今年最值得关注的趋势。
content.en: In 2024, the frontend development field will continue to thrive. AI-assisted development, edge computing, WebAssembly, and other technologies are reshaping how we build web applications. Let's take a look at the most noteworthy trends this year.

title.zh: 毛玻璃效果的实现技巧

summary.zh: 使用 CSS 实现流行的毛玻璃视觉效果，为你的设计增添现代感。
summary.en: Implement popular glassmorphism visual effects with CSS to add a modern touch to your designs.

content.zh: 毛玻璃效果（Glassmorphism）是近年来非常流行的设计风格。通过 backdrop-filter 属性配合适当的背景颜色和边框，我们可以创造出精致的半透明玻璃效果。本文将详细介绍实现方法。
content.en: Glassmorphism has been a very popular design style in recent years. Through the backdrop-filter property combined with appropriate background colors and borders, we can create refined semi-transparent glass effects. This article will detail the implementation methods.

summary.zh: 从 Express 路由到数据持久化，全面掌握 Node.js 后端开发。
summary.en: From Express routing to data persistence, master Node.js backend development comprehensively.

content.zh: Node.js 凭借其高效的事件驱动模型和丰富的生态系统，成为构建后端服务的热门选择。本文将通过实际案例，介绍如何使用 Express 框架构建 RESTful API。
content.en: Node.js has become a popular choice for building backend services due to its efficient event-driven model and rich ecosystem. This article will introduce how to build RESTful APIs using the Express framework through practical examples.
